title: pyrus × pomazensis
intro: Pyrus × pomazensis, also known as the Chinese pear or apricot pear, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Pyrus communis and Prunus mume. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus × pomazensis include relieving symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and cough, as well as protecting against cardiovascular disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of Pyrus × pomazensis can be found in the form of tea, decoctions, and infusions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
